title: Improve documentation of `--authfile`
body:
- Don't claim that Windows uses `XDG_RUNTIME_DIR`, defer to the authoritative man page.
- Consistently document the (regrettable?) `REGISTRY_AUTH_FILE` environment variable.
- Consistently refer to "registry credentials file", not "authentication file".
- (Also deemphasizes `(docker login)`, I'm not sure we want that.)

Fixes #2585 .
